Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Settlement Of First Account
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Continued To Jun-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Settlement Of First Account
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Continued To Jun-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Laurel Adams for Victor Stevens. Michael Freedman for Veronica Tiller (Conservatee).

Mr. Freedman stated that he never received Ms. Adams brief and that the mediation was cancelled by the mediator since he did not receive Ms. Adams brief. Ms. Adams stated that she had submitted a brief, that it was one day late, and that she had made them aware of her unavailabilty during that time period. The matter was re-referred to mediation, the parties were ordered to contact Mr. Frietz by Wednesday (4-8-09) of this week to check into his availability for a full day of mediation, and that if Mr. Frietz was not available they were to select another name from the list. If by April 10, 2009 they could not find a mediator who was available then they were to contact the clerk in department 204. The Court ordered the mediation to be completed by May 20, 2009 and set status on the mediation for June 8, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition For Settlement Of First Account
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Continued To Apr-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Veronica Tiller. Laurel Adams for the Objecting Party.

The Court informed the parties that Mr. Steven's opposition filed on Friday had not been scanned, that no courtesy copy was delivered, and that it had not been reviewed. Ms. Adams stated that opposition was to the accounting only. The Court granted the request for an order confirming trust property and for interpretation of the trust, (order to be signed upon review). The parties agreed to attend Pro Bono Mediation for the accounting issues (order for the same to be signed), Mediation is to be completed by March 6, 2009. If Mediation is not successful, Mr. Freedman is to file a supplement to the accounting to address issues raised in the Examiner's notes by March 13, 2009. The matter was continued to April 6, 2009 for status on mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
